---
title: "Trying to add a hidden folder to amarok's library."
date: 2008-04-24
forum: Multimedia Software
---

### Post by JimmyHopkins on 2008-04-24
Hello ubuntu community. I have my music stored under /home/name/.music, and would like to add this folder to amarok. How would I add a hidden folder? I tried going to /home/name/.kde/share/apps/amarok, but I can't find the config file that houses where my music collection is at.

Thanks in advance!

---
